name: Mandarin Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 Schwan's Unbreaded Chicken Breast Filets, thawed
1 cup wide style chow mein noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the thawed Unbreaded Chicken Breast Filets in a large bowl and pour 1/3 cup of salad dressing over the meat. Turn the pieces with tongs to cover all sides.
2. Cook the chicken in a medium frying pan according to package directions.
3. Prepare the Sugar Snap Peas according to package directions. Drain in a colander and rinse peas with cold water until they are cool to touch.
4. Put the salad greens in a large bowl. Add the remaining bottled dressing, mandarin oranges, and cooked Sugar Snap Peas. Mix together.
5. Divide the salad mixture among 4 plates. Lay a cooked chicken breast on top of each salad. Sprinkle each salad with a handful of chow mein noodles.
